headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -24.7)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 26% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 119 quotes, driven by an exceptional 99 strong-intensity comments - people are really venting hard today.

• The frustration score of 41.5 sits in the middle of the historical range but doubled from yesterday's already elevated levels.

• Fears dropped significantly to -33.3 while optimism improved slightly from yesterday's low but remains well below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
